**Medical Assessment and Rating Board for Indian System of Medicine**

**National Commission for Indian System of Medicine, New Delhi**

**Assessment Report of Ayurveda Postgraduate Departments for the Academic Session 2026-27**

**File no. 3-4/MARB/2025-Ay-PG.(11)**

**Dated:-GOLDEN**

It is submitted that **National PG Institute of Ayurveda, Jaipur, Rajasthan (Inst. ID-PGAYU001)** was visited on **2026-06-10 and 2026-06-11** to assess the available facilities of Postgraduate teaching and training for **Annual visitation for issuance of Annual permission with intake capacity of 6 seats in PG (MD/MS Ayurveda) course for the academic session 2026-27 under section 28/29 of NCISM Act, 2020** by the visitors namely:-

| **S. No.** | **Visitor’s Name** | **Visitor ID** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Dr. Anjali Sharma | V06001 |
| 2 | Dr. Ramesh Gupta | V06044 |

Further, after examination of the visitation report along with all the annexures, the following compliance/shortcomings have been observed against MESAR (PG) Ayurveda 2024:-

**Land:**
1. Minimum required land (stand-alone PG institution) — Land available is 5 acres against the requirement of 5 acres - fulfilling.

**Infrastructure:**
2. Seminar hall / auditorium — A common seminar hall / auditorium is available.
3. Student Support and Guidance Cell room — Student Support and Guidance Cell room is 22 sq.mt. against the requirement of 20 sq.mt. - fulfilling.

**Library & Digital Library:**
4. Central library area — Central library area is 160 sq.mt. against the requirement of 150 sq.mt. - fulfilling.
5. Digital library area — Digital library area is 45 sq.mt. against the requirement of 40 sq.mt. - fulfilling.
6. Digital library computer systems for PG (1:5) — Digital library has 2 PG computer systems against the requirement of 2 (1 per 5 PG students).

**Biometric Attendance (AEBAS):**
7. Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System (AEBAS) — Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System is implemented and functional.

**College Website:**
8. College website — Functional

**Hospital & Departmental Functionality:**
9. Additional IPD beds for the PG department (4:1 per PG seat) — Additional PG-department IPD beds are 24 against the requirement of 24 (4 per PG seat).
10. Departmental average bed occupancy — Average bed occupancy is 78% against the minimum requirement of 80% - not fulfilling.

**Postgraduate guides / teaching staff:-** Postgraduate guide / teaching staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Non-teaching staff:-** Non-teaching staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Hospital staff:-** Hospital staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Punitive Action Summary (Punitive Policy 2026-27, approved in the 160th Board Meeting)**

| **Deficiency** | **Consequence** | **Seats** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Departmental average bed occupancy: 2.50% deficiency | Seat reduction | 2 |

Cumulative seat reduction of **2 seats** (33.33% of the sanctioned intake of 6).
